name: ts-typecheck
description: Run TypeScript type-checking with tsc, filtering output to show errors compactly.

parameters.name: tsconfig
parameters.description: Path to tsconfig.json, default uses --showConfig or auto-detect

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: Single .ts file to type-check instead of full project

parameters.name: --head
parameters.description: Show only first N lines of output, default 30

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses the npx tsc + head pipeline into one step and avoids output noise, saving 1-2 agent steps per type-check.
